props.name: items
props.description: An array of carousel items. Each item must include title, description, id, and icon.

props.name: baseWidth
props.description: Total width (in px) of the carousel container. Effective item width is baseWidth minus padding.

props.name: autoplay
props.description: Enables automatic scrolling to the next item at a fixed interval.

props.name: autoplayDelay
props.description: Delay in milliseconds between automatic scrolls when autoplay is enabled.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Pauses the autoplay functionality when the carousel is hovered.

props.name: loop
props.description: When true, the carousel loops seamlessly from the last item back to the first.

props.name: round
props.description: When true, the carousel is rendered with a 1:1 aspect ratio and circular container/items.
